info.title: Eventflow
info.description: Multi-tenant Group Travel & Event Booking Infrastructure. Digitizes MICE events and destination weddings from venue discovery to final rooming list.

post.summary: Register a new tenant and admin user
post.description:
Creates a new tenant organization and its first admin user.
Returns JWT tokens for immediate login.
Authenticate user and return JWT tokens.
Get a new access token using a valid refresh token.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's details.

post.description:
Create a new MICE event or wedding.

Only admin and planner roles can create events.
The event is automatically scoped to the current user's tenant.

get.description:
Get paginated list of events for the current tenant.
Supports filtering by status and type.
Get a single event by ID.

put.description:
Update an event. Only provided fields are changed.
Only admin and planner roles can update events.

post.description:
Create a global venue. In a production system, this could be
restricted to super-admins, but for testing any authenticated user works.

get.description:
Browse available venues with optional filtering.
Any authenticated user can search venues.
Get full details for a specific venue.

post.summary: Add a single guest to an event
post.description:
Add a single guest to the event matching the current user's tenant.
Guest email must be unique within the event.

get.description:
Get paginated list of guests for an event.
You can optionally filter by category or include inactive (soft-deleted) guests.

post.description:
Import up to 500 guests in a single pass.
Errors on individual rows (e.g. duplicate email) will skip that row and
report the error, but the rest of the batch will succeed.

get.description: Get details for a single guest.

put.description: Partial update of a guest. Only provided fields change.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a guest. Their booking token stops working,
but their historical data stays in the system.

post.summary: Create a room block with allotments
post.description:
Creates a new room block linking an event to a venue, initializing 
separate allotment rows for each room type provided.

In Phase 2, blocks are created natively as "confirmed".

get.summary: List all room blocks for an event
get.description: Get all room blocks and their detailed allotments (inventory) for a given event.
Get details and allotments for a single room block.

put.description:
Partial update for block metadata (dates, deadline, notes).
Allotment inventory adjustments are handled via specific inventory endpoints.

post.description:
Manually add a guest to the waitlist from the planner dashboard.
(Guests can also auto-add themselves via a public route in Phase 2E).

get.description:
Get paginated waitlist entries. Computes relative position for guests
with `status=waiting` without rewriting the database.

put.description:
Allow planners to cancel or expire a waitlist entry.
If an 'offered' entry is cancelled, it immediately promotes the next waiting guest.

post.summary: Guest auto-adds to waitlist via magic link
post.description:
Public route for guests to join a waitlist using their booking token.
Validates token and maps the action to the correct guest and event context.

get.description: Get wallet balance and transaction history for a guest.

post.description: Load an additional subsidy into a guest's wallet.

get.description: Aggregate total wallet statistics for the event.

post.summary: Create or configure the Event Microsite
post.description:
Creates the microsite configuration exposing the event slug.
Only authorized planners can do this.

get.description:
Allows a guest to view the microsite's welcome page and event details.
A valid booking token acts as their identity.

Returns only the specific room blocks the guest is permitted to see,
along with their exact out-of-pocket subsidized prices.
Also returns real-time availability.

Called by Planners to download their event headcount instantly.
Spits out a clean, PMS-ready CSV containing all guest, dates, and finalized balance data.

200.description: A CSV file containing the finalized rooming list.

get.summary: List all email notification logs for an event
get.description: Returns an audit log of all communications sent by the background Celery workers.

post.summary: Send manual reminder blast to specific guest categories
post.description:
Send a manual reminder email blast to all unbooked guests in the specified categories.

The planner sees the analytics dashboard showing 60% of VIPs haven't booked.
They hit this endpoint with categories=["vip"] and an optional custom_message.
The system finds all unbooked guests in those categories, queues one Celery
email task per guest, and returns immediately with the count.

Request body:
    {
        "categories": ["vip", "family"],
        "custom_message": "VIP rooms are filling up fast. Please confirm by Friday."
    }

Returns:
    { "queued": 47, "categories": ["vip", "family"], "event_name": "Acme Offsite" }

Step 1 of the booking flow. Uses the guest_token instead of JWT auth.
Attempts to secure a 15-minute Redis lock and returns a HELD booking object.
FRONTEND: Display the `hold_expires_at` countdown timer!

Step 2 of the booking flow. Usually called backend-to-backend by Razorpay.
For this API, simulating it by passing the booking ID and payment reference.
Converts HELD to CONFIRMED.

get.description: Get all bookings (HELD, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED) for an event.

delete.description:
Cancel a booking. This automatically triggers `promote_next` 
in the background to offer the newly available room to the 
first person on the waitlist.

get.summary: Dashboard Overview — inventory, budget, guests, activity
get.description:
Returns the complete dashboard snapshot:
- Room inventory (all room types with booked/held/available/waitlist counts)
- Guest status breakdown (confirmed/pending/waitlisted/cancelled)
- Budget consumption overview (loaded/spent/remaining/projected)
- Recent activity feed (last 10 booking lifecycle events)

This is called once when the dashboard page loads. After loading,
the WebSocket connection takes over for live updates.

get.summary: Demand Forecast — velocity, stockout predictions, demographics
get.description:
Returns actionable intelligence for the planner:
- Booking velocity chart data (rooms booked per day, last 30 days)
- Stockout predictions per room type (projected full date, status flags)
- Category demographics (which guest categories are booking fastest)

This powers the 'Deadline Pressure' panel and the velocity chart.
Simple health check endpoint.

ActivityEntry.title: ActivityEntry
ActivityEntry.description: Single entry in the live booking feed.

AllotmentCreate.title: AllotmentCreate
AllotmentCreate.description: Details for a single room type allotment when creating a block.

AnalyticsOverviewResponse.title: AnalyticsOverviewResponse
AnalyticsOverviewResponse.description: Full dashboard snapshot returned on initial page load.

BookingConfirmRequest.title: BookingConfirmRequest
BookingConfirmRequest.description:
Payload when the Razorpay webhook returns a successful payment (Step 2).
In a real app, you would also pass Razorpay signatures to verify,
but here we expect the proxy/webhook handler to just pass the ref.

BookingHoldRequest.title: BookingHoldRequest
BookingHoldRequest.description: Payload to attempt a 15-minute room hold (Step 1).

BookingResponse.title: BookingResponse
BookingResponse.description: Data returned to guest or planner.

BudgetOverview.title: BudgetOverview
BudgetOverview.description: Corporate wallet aggregate for the event.

description.title: Description
examples: 3-day team offsite in Goa with sessions and activities

EventResponse.title: EventResponse
EventResponse.description: Full event data returned in API responses.

guests.title: Guests
guests.description: List of guests to import. Max 500 per request.

GuestBulkCreate.title: GuestBulkCreate
GuestBulkCreate.description: Bulk import: up to 500 guests in a single request.

GuestBulkCreateItem.title: GuestBulkCreateItem
GuestBulkCreateItem.description: A single guest entry inside a bulk import payload.

GuestBulkCreateResponse.title: GuestBulkCreateResponse
GuestBulkCreateResponse.description: Result of a bulk import operation.

email.title: Email
email.description: Optional at creation — can be added later via update.

category.title: Category
category.description: Category controls which room types and subsidy this guest gets. Must match a key in the event's category_rules. Examples: employee, vip, family, delegate, speaker

GuestCreate.title: GuestCreate
GuestCreate.description: Create a single guest for an event.

GuestResponse.title: GuestResponse
GuestResponse.description: Full guest data returned in API responses.

GuestStatusBreakdown.title: GuestStatusBreakdown
GuestStatusBreakdown.description: Aggregate guest booking status for the event.

GuestUpdate.title: GuestUpdate
GuestUpdate.description: Update a guest — all fields optional.

PublicEventDetailsResponse.title: PublicEventDetailsResponse
PublicEventDetailsResponse.description: The generic details returned to the frontend when a valid guest asks for the page payload.

PublicRoomOption.title: PublicRoomOption
PublicRoomOption.description: A room option conditionally rendered for a guest based on their category

PublicWaitlistCreate.title: PublicWaitlistCreate
PublicWaitlistCreate.description: Payload for guests joining waitlist via magic link token.

RefreshRequest.title: RefreshRequest
RefreshRequest.description: Request a new access token using a refresh token.

RegisterRequest.title: RegisterRequest
RegisterRequest.description: Register a new tenant + admin user in one step.

ReminderBlastRequest.title: ReminderBlastRequest
ReminderBlastRequest.description: Request body for the manual reminder blast endpoint.

hold_deadline.title: Hold Deadline
hold_deadline.description: Date when unclaimed rooms are released back to the hotel

allotments.title: Allotments
allotments.description: List of room types and their quantities/prices

RoomBlockCreate.title: RoomBlockCreate
RoomBlockCreate.description: Payload to create a Room Block and its allotments.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: JWT token pair returned on login/register.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: User data returned in API responses.

VelocityDataPoint.title: VelocityDataPoint
VelocityDataPoint.description: Single day in the booking velocity chart.

VenueCreate.title: VenueCreate
VenueCreate.description: Payload to create a new venue.

VenueListResponse.title: VenueListResponse
VenueListResponse.description: Paginated list of venues with optional filters.

VenueResponse.title: VenueResponse
VenueResponse.description: Full venue data returned in API responses.

WaitlistActionRequest.title: WaitlistActionRequest
WaitlistActionRequest.description: Payload when a planner manually changes waitlist status.

WaitlistCreate.title: WaitlistCreate
WaitlistCreate.description: Payload to add a guest to the waitlist.

WaitlistResponse.title: WaitlistResponse
WaitlistResponse.description: Data returned to the planner or guest.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount to load into the wallet
